div.class: proofing-review-topbar d-flex align-items-center px-3 py-2 border-bottom bg-view position-relative
position-absolute start-50 translate-middle-x d-flex align-items-center gap-2
d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-3 py-2 border-bottom

div.t-att-class: 'proofing-sidebar-file p-2 border-bottom cursor-pointer ' + (isActiveFile(file) ? 'bg-primary bg-opacity-10 border-start border-primary border-3' : '')

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center proofing-thumb rounded mb-1
flex-grow-1 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center position-relative overflow-auto proofing-canvas-viewport

img.style: width: 100%; display: block; pointer-events: none; user-select: none;

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-3 py-2 border-bottom
proofing-recording-bar mb-2 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded
proofing-voice-preview mb-2 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded

button.class: btn btn-link btn-sm p-0 ms-1 text-danger
